title: Contact
subtitle: Tell us what you need and we’ll respond.

form.title: Contact form
form.hint: Fill in your details and we’ll get back to you shortly.

sections.detailsHint: How we can reach you about your inquiry.
sections.messageHint: Share trip plans, dates, or any questions.

form.name: Full name
form.success: Thank you — your message was sent. We’ll reply as soon as we can.

placeholders.name: Your name
placeholders.message: Tell us about your trip, dates, or questions…

errors.name: Please enter your full name (at least 2 characters).
errors.phone: Please enter a valid phone number with country code.
errors.email: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.message: Please write a message (at least 10 characters).
errors.submitFailed: We couldn’t send your message. Please try again in a moment.
errors.network: Connection problem. Check your internet and try again.
errors.notConfigured: The contact form isn’t set up on this site yet. Please call or email us directly.
errors.domain: This website isn’t approved for form delivery yet. Please contact us by phone or email, or ask the site owner to enable the domain in Web3Forms.
errors.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
